subject: API Timeout Issue Still Unresolved
body:
Hello,

The API timeout ticket (TK-201) submitted last week has still not been resolved. Our dispatch system is experiencing dozens of errors daily due to your API timeouts. This issue is now seriously affecting our daily operations.

If a solution is not provided within this week, we may need to consider alternative vendors.

Zhao Lei
Everway Logistics

subject: Serious Dissatisfaction with Service Quality
body:
Hello,

I must express our team's serious dissatisfaction with recent service quality. In addition to the API issue, data exports are frequently erroneous, and our reporting team has to spend an extra hour daily verifying data.

Please arrange for a technical lead to contact me as soon as possible.

Zhao Lei

subject: Compliance Report Generation Issue - Urgent Follow-up
body:
Hello,

The compliance report generation failure ticket (TK-210) I submitted has been open for two days now. As a medical device company, compliance reports are a regulatory requirement and cannot be delayed.

Additionally, the data sync delay issue is very concerning to us, as real-time accuracy of medical data is critical.

Please prioritize this.

Chen Jing
Azure Sea Medical

subject: Some Concerns About Renewal
body:
Hello,

Our contract expires this June. Frankly, the recent technical issues are making us hesitant about whether to renew. Before making a final decision, we would like to see a clear resolution timeline for these issues.

Chen Jing

subject: Next Quarter Collaboration Plans
body:
Hello,

Last quarter's collaboration went very smoothly. I would like to know if there is a new feature release plan for next quarter? In particular, enhancements to the risk control module.

We are also considering expanding usage to branch offices.

Wu Tao
Stellar Finance

subject: Friday Team Building Activity Notice
body: Dear colleagues, there will be a spring team building activity this Friday afternoon. Please attend on time.
